assertions.title: Reroll Position Consistent Across Title Lengths

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3000 and set viewport to 390x844
steps.observed: Application loaded successfully showing 'Folge 232: Die Stadt aus Gold'

steps.action: Set viewport to 1920x1080 and capture desktop screenshot
Reroll multiple times to get albums with varying title lengths
steps.expected: Different albums displayed with different title lengths
steps.observed: Captured albums with titles ranging from short ('Folge 125: Feuermond') to medium ('Folge 88: Vampir im Internet') to long ('Folge 225: und der Puppenmacher')

steps.action: Compare footer/reroll button positions across screenshots
steps.expected: Reroll button position remains stable regardless of title length
steps.observed: Visual comparison of screenshots confirms the reroll button maintains consistent position in the footer area across different album titles

assertions.title: Reroll Position With and Without Runtime

steps.action: Check if runtime is displayed for albums
steps.expected: Some albums should show runtime, others should not
steps.observed: All albums tested show 'runtime: null' - no runtime text displayed

steps.action: Query API for albums with runtime data
steps.observed: Only 2 albums in cache have runtime data (IDs:498039308, 1529420801), but neither is in the current playable buckets. All served albums have null runtime.

assertions.issues: Cannot fully test this assertion because no albums in the current playable buckets (all, old, medium, new) have runtime data. The cache only contains runtime information for 2 albums (collection IDs 498039308 and 1529420801), neither of which appears in the bucket lists. However, since runtime never appears in the UI, the footer position remains stable for all tested albums.

steps.action: Reroll 5 times, capturing screenshots each time
steps.observed: Captured 6 desktop screenshots (VAL-STABLE-003-desktop-1 through VAL-STABLE-003-desktop-6) showing albums: 'Folge 69: Späte Rache', 'Folge 72: Dreckiger Deal', 'Folge 203: Tauchgang ins Ungewisse', 'Folge 68: und der Schatz im Bergsee', 'Folge 222: und die Gesetzlosen', 'Folge 47: und der giftige Gockel'

Captured 5 mobile screenshots (VAL-STABLE-003-mobile-1 through VAL-STABLE-003-mobile-5) showing albums: 'Folge 47: und der giftige Gockel', 'Folge 79: Im Bann des Voodoo', 'Folge 84: Musik des Teufels', 'Folge 214: und der Geisterbunker', 'Folge 43: und der höllische Werwolf'

steps.action: Compare footer height across all screenshots
steps.observed: Visual inspection confirms the footer area (containing age filter toggle and reroll button) maintains consistent height across all albums at both viewport sizes

summary: Tested 3 stability assertions: 2 passed, 1 blocked. VAL-STABLE-001 (title length stability) and VAL-STABLE-003 (footer height consistency) passed with visual confirmation across multiple albums. VAL-STABLE-002 (runtime presence) is blocked - no albums in the current playable buckets contain runtime data, so the 'with runtime' scenario cannot be tested. However, all albums show consistent footer behavior since runtime never appears.
